creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vanilla
Date: Fri May  9 03:02:53 2014
New Revision: 353380
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353380
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353380/

Log:
  - Stage
  - Add LICENSE
  - Fix pkg-plist
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		ports/188673
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr@

Modified:
  head/net-p2p/py-py2play/Makefile
  head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-descr
  head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-p2p/py-py2play/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/py-py2play/Makefile	Fri May  9 01:36:19 2014	(r353379)
+++ head/net-p2p/py-py2play/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:02:53 2014	(r353380)
@@ -11,21 +11,22 @@ DISTNAME=	Py2Play-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	acm@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Peer-to-peer network game engine
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 DIST_SUBDIR=	python
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	Py2Play
 EXAMPLESDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/examples/py-py2play
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-install:
 .ifndef NOPORTEXAMPLES
-	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/startdemo ${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/startdemo ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
 .endif
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 01:36:19 2014	(r353379)
+++ head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:02:53 2014	(r353380)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Py2Play is a peer-to-peer network game engine -- It means that no
 server is needed to play. Only (identical) clients are used
 
-WWW:	http://home.gna.org/oomadness/en/slune/index.html
+WWW: http://home.gna.org/oomadness/en/slune/index.html

Modified: head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-plist	Fri May  9 01:36:19 2014	(r353379)
+++ head/net-p2p/py-py2play/pkg-plist	Fri May  9 03:02:53 2014	(r353380)
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/py2play/setup.py
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/py2play/setup.pyc
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/py2play/setup.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/py2play/__init__.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/py2play/action.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/py2play/character.py
